From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>

Date: Thu, 07 Mar 2024 09:57:50 -0800
Subject: Biden to begin laying out second-term vision in State of the Union

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

    <td class="OneColLarge">

            <tr>
                <td width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">

            <tr>
                <td align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">

                                <tr>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>
                    <a id="SmlArticleImg4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADXYNADEFSX63PVUTES2ZVQZXBXWNR2IYRX52RCG656NPOHYUU4D47TAVS2OJAFHAVMPLBI3MIC3KBMDRRYRH2KVSVMJM4MLFIA2RV35KTUOA5RSKLUWWPS3QYYGG42PYGDCASNC32I6CIARO3IZ7BN35V7V5VLVCP2OEU5SIDHJSY3TDROU3&" target="_blank">

            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="SmlArticleTitle4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADG3IRD5MWKJZIQJYLT2ZSORV7Z6S3SL4FU4PKELBHSIV37J46MQKQUVR5GMRGJFJQ7W4NAB5XDEGI75WX27CQTGC2J3ODHSMOJ2UKNUCCMMFGFRWNFMOEBE6F3VWT4CHNG5PG2WGFQUB7WXWZGPYU2IE2IF5SMVNTVDJWTTJOPO5TJRURGWS&" target="_blank">

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                    <td height="45" style="padding-right: 12px; padding-top: 5px">
                                        <a id="SmlArticlePubLogo4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACIJLMKNNE62PEG2NB7WEHUX2PJUBALCK5R6JCB2BB42LHIKLUE5SIUGSWQQLDSBCQYEAOANJETTELKQC5Y52FO3TZMJ4VJ335B6HADWYUKH7R7ATS5XRHDWJLVCCFHQVE6ZJ4MHLYPJQEZWC3YKMO636FE65A6DJLHAZGEMKLD6YNJOAT4AV&" target="_blank">

                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                <td height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="SmlArticlePubName4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADJWODNWYKRG7YTRJTYL5M6M3TKCU4LHQ2AQIHHCIZVQQGKMBBNNXDF627LGOIVKF4ES6QLHTZDAV7EXDPWC3CEGFTYNXDO22KPZHBNP4N45LDWNXSGXHJDNRVOF5AMYBRRTKMZO7K3Z4EDFPOGT4UHCOANYQ36UV535LTHETWZEPP36SKYV2&" target="_blank">

                                    </a>
                                </td>

                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>
</td>
                                    <td style="padding:4px;margin:0px;width:0px; background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;
                                    </td>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>
                    <a id="SmlArticleImg5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACPEI2ZMTGHLF2C75OLTKF2PW2B6P4FQQURLH5T4V6OYLOX2K2QO5BI5HAIAYLW7FF7TJMWWBYQNW5JEQB5DC2XDDRORUNPEN54PQ4XKIOK5JGSHV67BJKA6DWPP366AIY2ZY6L4F7PCPN32UHD3GLLKOAC7QDZNT2FDB4WWHVZFXV6YTKP66&" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">

                        Last moments of £170,000,000 Russian warship after 20-minute battle
                    </a>

            </tr>

    <td align="center">
